name: condolab-ansible
postCreateCommand: bash -lc 'sudo install -d -m 700 -o vscode -g vscode /home/vscode/.ssh && sudo find /tmp/host-ssh -maxdepth 1 -type f -exec cp {} /home/vscode/.ssh/ \; && sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /home/vscode/.ssh && sudo chmod 700 /home/vscode/.ssh && sudo find /home/vscode/.ssh -type f -name "*.pub" -exec chmod 644 {} \; && sudo find /home/vscode/.ssh -type f ! -name "*.pub" -exec chmod 600 {} \; && cd src/infrastructure/ansible && ansible-galaxy collection install -r requirements.yml'
